opening.speaker: Pink Panther
opening.text: Camp Chilly Wa Wa... it's been a while.

opening.speaker: Pink Panther
opening.text: The old sign is barely standing, the cabins have seen better days...

opening.speaker: Pink Panther
opening.text: But a job is a job. Time to meet the kids.

day2.speaker: Pink Panther
day2.text: What a night... I could hear Marcus from across the camp.

day2.speaker: Pink Panther
day2.text: I need to find him. He must be in his cabin.

day2.speaker: Pink Panther
day2.text: And then I should tell Higgins about this.

paris_street.speaker: Pink Panther
paris_street.text: Ah, Paris! The city of lights, love, and... mysteries, apparently.

paris_street.speaker: Pink Panther
paris_street.text: Marcus kept drawing a museum with a glass pyramid. That must be the Louvre.

paris_street.speaker: Pink Panther
paris_street.text: Time to find out what he's been seeing.
